compactionEngine.signature: compactContext(context: object, options?: { budget?: number }): CompactedContext
compactionEngine.description: Context-aware compaction that preserves active state while summarizing completed work

compactionTriggers.description: Hook system for triggering compaction at defined lifecycle points

reviewPipelineStructure.description: Split review artifacts that compaction can individually summarize rather than treating as monolith

budgetEnforced.description: Working context must stay below ~120k tokens during multi-wave execution

noQualityDegradation.description: Agent output quality must not observably degrade after compaction

diskRecovery.description: Any compacted information must be recoverable from disk artifacts
